# FinBoard

> FinBoard is an AI-native financial operations platform built for multi-entity operators — restaurants, construction firms, retailers, e-commerce brands, healthcare groups, and software companies. It automates month-end close, multi-entity consolidation, FP&A, procure-to-pay, and order-to-cash workflows, giving finance teams a single governed workspace powered by QuickBooks data and AI agents.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://finboard.ai/) — Platform overview: AI agents for multi-entity financial close, consolidation, and analytics.
- [About](https://finboard.ai/about) — FinBoard's mission and team: finance and engineering leaders from PwC, Rippling, Samsung and more.
- [For Operators](https://finboard.ai/operators) — How FinBoard serves multi-entity operators managing 5–200+ entities across complex org structures.
- [Advisory](https://finboard.ai/advisory) — FinBoard for fractional CFOs, CAS firms, and fund admins: run every client's finance in one workspace.
- [Pricing](https://finboard.ai/pricing) — Custom-quoted per group; pricing varies by entity count, modules, and seats.
- [Engagement Model](https://finboard.ai/engagement) — How FinBoard onboards and delivers: discovery, implementation, and ongoing cadence.
- [Testimonials](https://finboard.ai/testimonials) — Customer stories and outcomes from operators who use FinBoard for financial close and reporting.

## Blog

- [Blog](https://finboard.ai/blog) — 45+ practical guides on US GAAP accounting, month-end close, multi-entity consolidation, FP&A and QuickBooks Online workflows, plus engineering notes.
- [How to Run a Multi-Entity Month-End Close in Under 5 Days](https://finboard.ai/blog/multi-entity-month-end-close-in-5-days) — The four bottlenecks that stretch a multi-entity close, and how to remove them to close in five days.
- [Accrued Expenses for Month-End Close: A Complete Guide](https://finboard.ai/blog/accrued-expenses-for-month-end-close-a-complete-guide) — US GAAP accrual recognition, high-risk areas, cutoff procedures and reversing entries.
- [Crypto Accounting under US GAAP (ASU 2023-08)](https://finboard.ai/blog/navigating-crypto-accounting-in-quickbooks-online-making-fair-value-work-after-asu-2023-08) — Fair-value crypto remeasurement, journal entries and disclosures in QuickBooks Online.
- [When the Model Becomes a Commodity](https://finboard.ai/blog/when-the-model-becomes-a-commodity) — Why AI models are commoditizing and why the moat is the harness and proprietary data, not the model.

## Templates

- [Finance Templates](https://finboard.ai/templates) — 80+ free, QuickBooks Online–ready Google Sheets templates: budgets, cash-flow forecasts, P&L, balance sheet, invoices, calculators (ASC 842 lease, ARR/MRR) and more.

## Products

- [Month-End Close](https://finboard.ai/products/month-end-close) — AI-assisted close checklists and automated reconciliation cutting close time to under 5 business days.
- [Consolidation](https://finboard.ai/products/consolidation) — Automated multi-entity consolidation with intercompany eliminations for groups of 50+ entities.
- [Analytics](https://finboard.ai/products/analytics) — Real-time P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow dashboards with drill-down to transaction level.
- [FP&A](https://finboard.ai/products/fpa) — Rolling forecasts, budget-vs-actuals, and scenario planning integrated with QuickBooks data.
- [Procure-to-Pay](https://finboard.ai/products/p2p) — Purchase order workflow, vendor payment approvals, and spend analytics across entities.
- [Order-to-Cash](https://finboard.ai/products/o2c) — Revenue tracking, AR aging, and collections workflow for multi-entity operators.

## Industries

- [Restaurants](https://finboard.ai/industries/restaurants) — Financial close and multi-location P&L reporting for restaurant groups.
- [Construction](https://finboard.ai/industries/construction) — Job costing, WIP reporting, and cash flow management for construction companies.
- [Retail](https://finboard.ai/industries/retail) — Multi-location inventory and margin reporting for retail operators.
- [E-Commerce](https://finboard.ai/industries/ecommerce) — Revenue reconciliation, COGS tracking, and platform fee analysis for e-commerce brands.
- [Healthcare](https://finboard.ai/industries/healthcare) — Multi-practice financial consolidation and compliance-ready reporting for healthcare groups.
- [Software & Services](https://finboard.ai/industries/software-and-services) — SaaS metrics, ARR tracking, and departmental P&L for software and professional services companies.
